ollama_failure.cli: ollama list timed out waiting for server to start after log file access errors

diagnosis.query_embedding_mismatch: cannot be confirmed with live Ollama because the embedding service is unavailable; fallback evaluation should not be treated as a model-quality signal
diagnosis.most_likely_primary_cause: indexed chunk embeddings are effectively identical, which forces stable-order retrieval toward early chunks and manifests as wrong_section misses
diagnosis.secondary_contributor: some early chunks span more than one section boundary, which can blur section-level targets even if embeddings are fixed
